color: rgb(13, 71, 161) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 1: Extract Current Focus
Scan last response then query
Find current_product + current_brand

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 2: Intent Strategy (Slots 1-2)
Look up INTENT_STRATEGY[intent]

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Use previous non-follow_up
intent strategy instead

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(74, 20, 140) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Slot 1: 'Warranty on RoboCleaner 3120?'
Slot 2: 'How much does RoboCleaner 3120 cost?'

div.style: color: rgb(27, 94, 32) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 3: Cross-User Intelligence (Slot 3)
Find co-occurring products across sessions

div.style: color: rgb(27, 94, 32) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(74, 20, 140) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Slot 3: 'Users who asked about
RoboCleaner 3120 also explored PowerDrill 5641'

div.style: color: rgb(27, 94, 32) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Fallback: Price alternative
Different brand, similar price (+-20%)

div.style: color: rgb(74, 20, 140) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Slot 3: 'Check out EcoKettle 1042
at a similar price point'

div.style: color: rgb(0, 77, 64) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Step 4: Dedup + Pad
Remove last query echo
Filter vs episodic memory
Pad to 3 from catalog generics

div.style: color: rgb(0, 77, 64) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
